RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added StartDate and StopDate Information. Updated metadata to 2.6.1. JMW.
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: The Jacksonville University (JAX) Geomagnetic Observatory. Jacksonville University, Jacksonville, FL.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge Mark Moldwin, Institute of Geophysics and Planetary Physics and the Department of Earth and Space Sciences, University of California, Los Angeles, Los Angeles, CA 90095-1567 for providing access to Jacksonville University data resources.

InformationURL.Name: The Jacksonville University geomagnetic observatory information.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
